name: Chainsaw Harem 2.0
description:
Second Part of Chainsaw Harem 😛

I'd advise to use this bot with deepseek and gemini, because context is just too big for JLMM to work properly :(

If you find any issues in bot, please inform in comments. At the moment, I'm really overwhelmed with student debts and headaches from my diagnosis, so I'm not sure I did everything very well. However, many people asked me to make a similar bot but with a himeno and kobeni in it, so I hope this is +- a normal result and you are not disappointed

I've tried to make this not just sex bot with 7 gals but something more interesting, like, plot shouldn't be focused on them together or separately on girls, like, there's should be random "NPC" depending on places where you are: street, store, work, highschool etc.

Also it's kidna hard to write a first message for that kind of bots, because putting forst message of harem within some limited scenario not really cool but making it neutral and long - hard 😔

Check out my ugly Pochita cake I've made 3 years ago(first time making a cake), maybe this year will try to make Pochita that doesn't looks like he has hemorrhoids 😭
